{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2004
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 2004
|image           =
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 4 - June 30
|num_teams       = 64
|champions       = [[Esporte Clube Santo André|Santo André (SP)]]
|runner-up       = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]
|matches         = 114
|goals           = 325
|top goal scorer = [[Dauri (footballer)|Dauri]] (8)
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2003 Copa do Brasil|2003]]
|nextseason      = [[2005 Copa do Brasil|2005]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 2004''' was the 16th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]]. 

The competition started on February 4, 2004 and concluded on June 30, 2004 with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio do Maracanã]] in [[Rio de Janeiro]], in which [[Esporte Clube Santo André|Santo André]] lifted the trophy for the first time with a 2-0 victory over [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]].

[[Dauri (footballer)|Dauri]], of [[Clube 15 de Novembro|15 de Novembro]], with 8 goals, was the competition's top goal scorer.

==Format==
The competition was played by 64 clubs in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format where all rounds were played over two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used, but in the first two rounds if the away team won the first leg with an advantage of at least two goals, the second leg was not played and the club automatically qualified to the next round.

==Competition stages==
{{64TeamBracket 

| RD1-team01=[[Tuna Luso Brasileira|Tuna Luso (PA)]]
| RD1-score01=1
| RD1-team02='''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score02=3

| RD1-team03='''[[São Gabriel Futebol Clube|São Gabriel (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score03=2 1
| RD1-team04=[[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense (SC)]]
| RD1-score04=2 0

| RD1-team05=[[Cuiabá Esporte Clube|Cuiabá (MT)]]
| RD1-score05=0 1
| RD1-team06='''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]'''
| RD1-score06=1 3

| RD1-team07=[[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA (AL)]]
| RD1-score07=1 0
| RD1-team08='''[[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense (DF)]]'''
| RD1-score08=1 3

| RD1-team09=[[Associação Desportiva Catuense|Catuense (BA)]]
| RD1-score09=4 1
| RD1-team10='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score10=2 5

| RD1-team11=[[Novo Horizonte Futebol Clube|Novo Horizonte (GO)]]
| RD1-score11=0
| RD1-team12='''[[Esporte Clube Santo André|Santo André (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score12=5

| RD1-team13=[[Sociedade Desportiva Serra Futebol Clube|Serra (ES)]]
| RD1-score13=1
| RD1-team14='''[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score14=4

| RD1-team15=[[Sociedade Esportiva União Cacoalense|União Cacoalense (RO)]]
| RD1-score15=1 0
| RD1-team16='''[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score16=1 0

| RD1-team17=[[Maranhão Atlético Clube|Maranhão (MA)]]
| RD1-score17=0
| RD1-team18='''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score18=5

| RD1-team19=[[Atlético Clube Paranavaí|Paranavaí (PR)]]
| RD1-score19=0 0
| RD1-team20='''[[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama (DF)]]'''
| RD1-score20=0 3

| RD1-team21='''[[Palmas Futebol e Regatas|Palmas (TO)]]'''
| RD1-score21=1 3
| RD1-team22=[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]
| RD1-score22=2 1

| RD1-team23=[[Parnahyba Esporte Clube|Parnahyba (PI)]]
| RD1-score23=2 1
| RD1-team24='''[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional (AM)]]'''
| RD1-score24=2 1

| RD1-team25=[[Esporte Clube Flamengo|Flamengo (PI)]]
| RD1-score25=0 0
| RD1-team26='''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score26=1 5

| RD1-team27='''[[Clube 15 de Novembro|15 de Novembro (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score27=1 2
| RD1-team28=[[Associação Atlética Portuguesa Santista|Portuguesa Santista (SP)]]
| RD1-score28=1 2

| RD1-team29=[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]]
| RD1-score29=1
| RD1-team30='''[[Americano Futebol Clube|Americano (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score30=4

| RD1-team31=[[Atlético Roraima Clube|Roraima (RR)]]
| RD1-score31=1 0
| RD1-team32='''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score32=2 4

| RD1-team33='''[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (PB)|Botafogo (PB)]]'''
| RD1-score33=0
| RD1-team34='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score34=2

| RD1-team35='''[[Ferroviário Atlético Clube|Ferroviário (CE)]]'''
| RD1-score35=4 0
| RD1-team36=[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]]
| RD1-score36=0 1

| RD1-team37=[[Atlético Cajazeirense de Desportos|Atlético Cajazeirense (PB)]]
| RD1-score37=0 2
| RD1-team38='''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza (CE)]]'''
| RD1-score38=1 2

| RD1-team39='''[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco (AC)]]'''
| RD1-score39=1 1
| RD1-team40=[[Atlético Rio Negro Clube|Rio Negro (AM)]]
| RD1-score40=0 0

| RD1-team41=[[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança (SE)]]
| RD1-score41=0 1
| RD1-team42='''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score42=0 4

| RD1-team43='''[[Prudentópolis Esporte Clube|Prudentópolis (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score43=4 1
| RD1-team44=[[São Gonçalo Futebol Clube|São Gonçalo (RN)]]
| RD1-score44=0 2

| RD1-team45=[[Centro de Treinamento Edmílson - CTE Colatina Futebol Clube|CTE Colatina (ES)]]
| RD1-score45=1 0
| RD1-team46='''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score46=2 4

| RD1-team47=[[Ypiranga Clube|Ypiranga (AP)]]
| RD1-score47=0 0
| RD1-team48='''[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa (MA)]]'''
| RD1-score48=0 4

| RD1-team49=[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Chapadão|SERC (MS)]]
| RD1-score49=0 1
| RD1-team50='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score50=0 2

| RD1-team51=[[America Football Club (RJ)|América (RJ)]]
| RD1-score51=0 0
| RD1-team52='''[[Londrina Esporte Clube|Londrina (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score52=1 1

| RD1-team53=[[Uberlândia Esporte Clube|Uberlândia (MG)]]
| RD1-score53=0
| RD1-team54='''[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score54=3

| RD1-team55=[[Caxias Futebol Clube|Caxias (SC)]]
| RD1-score55=1
| RD1-team56='''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score56=3

| RD1-team57=[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB (AL)]]
| RD1-score57=4 1
| RD1-team58='''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score58=4 3

| RD1-team59='''[[Tupi Football Club|Tupi (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score59=2 1
| RD1-team60=[[Bangu Atlético Clube|Bangu (RJ)]]
| RD1-score60=2 0

| RD1-team61=[[Barra do Garças Futebol Clube|Barra (MT)]]<ref>[[Barra do Garças Futebol Clube|Barra (MT)]]'s all 17 players registered in the competition were ineligible to play in the first leg so the classification was awarded to [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]].</ref>
| RD1-score61=0
| RD1-team62='''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score62=0

| RD1-team63='''[[Centro Esportivo Nova Esperança|CENE (MS)]]'''
| RD1-score63=1 0 (pen: 4)
| RD1-team64=[[União Agrícola Barbarense Futebol Clube|União Barbarense (SP)]]
| RD1-score64=0 1 (pen: 1)


| RD2-team01='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD2-score01=1 4
| RD2-team02=São Gabriel (RS)
| RD2-score02=2 0

| RD2-team03='''Goiás (GO)'''
| RD2-score03=2 0
| RD2-team04=Brasiliense (DF)
| RD2-score04=2 0

| RD2-team05=Atlético (MG)
| RD2-score05=0 2
| RD2-team06='''Santo André (SP)'''
| RD2-score06=3 0

| RD2-team07=América (MG)
| RD2-score07=1 0
| RD2-team08='''Guarani (SP)'''
| RD2-score08=1 1

| RD2-team09=Botafogo (RJ)
| RD2-score09=4 2
| RD2-team10='''Gama (DF)'''
| RD2-score10=4 3

| RD2-team11='''Palmas (TO)'''
| RD2-score11=5 0
| RD2-team12=Nacional (AM)
| RD2-score12=0 3

| RD2-team13=Vasco (RJ)
| RD2-score13=1 0
| RD2-team14='''15 de Novembro (RS)'''
| RD2-score14=1 3

| RD2-team15='''Americano (RJ)'''
| RD2-score15=2 0
| RD2-team16=Sport (PE)
| RD2-score16=1 0

| RD2-team17='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD2-score17=2
| RD2-team18=Ferroviário (CE)
| RD2-score18=0

| RD2-team19='''Fortaleza (CE)'''
| RD2-score19=1 5
| RD2-team20=Rio Branco (AC)
| RD2-score20=1 1

| RD2-team21='''Internacional (RS)'''
| RD2-score21=2
| RD2-team22=Prudentópolis (PR)
| RD2-score22=0

| RD2-team23='''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD2-score23=0 3
| RD2-team24=Sampaio Corrêa (MA)
| RD2-score24=1 1

| RD2-team25='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD2-score25=2
| RD2-team26=Londrina (PR)
| RD2-score26=0

| RD2-team27=Juventude (RS)
| RD2-score27=2 1
| RD2-team28='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD2-score28=2 2

| RD2-team29='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD2-score29=3 4
| RD2-team30=Tupi (MG)
| RD2-score30=2 0

| RD2-team31='''Santa Cruz (PE)'''
| RD2-score31=0 3
| RD2-team32=CENE (MS)
| RD2-score32=1 0

| RD3-team01='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD3-score01=1 (pen: 3)
| RD3-team02=Goiás (GO)
| RD3-score02=1 (pen: 1)

| RD3-team03='''Santo André (SP)'''
| RD3-score03=1 0
| RD3-team04=Guarani (SP)
| RD3-score04=1 0

| RD3-team05=Gama (DF)
| RD3-score05=1 2
| RD3-team06='''Palmas (TO)'''
| RD3-score06=1 3

| RD3-team07='''15 de Novembro (RS)'''
| RD3-score07=2 3
| RD3-team08=Americano (RJ)
| RD3-score08=1 2

| RD3-team09='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD3-score09=0 1
| RD3-team10=Fortaleza (CE)
| RD3-score10=0 1

| RD3-team11=Internacional (RS)
| RD3-score11=1 1
| RD3-team12='''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD3-score12=1 3

| RD3-team13='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD3-score13=2 4
| RD3-team14=Fluminense (RJ)
| RD3-score14=2 1

| RD3-team15='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD3-score15=1 1
| RD3-team16=Santa Cruz (PE)
| RD3-score16=0 0

| RD4-team01=Palmeiras (SP)
| RD4-score01=3 4
| RD4-team02='''Santo André (SP)'''
| RD4-score02=3 4

| RD4-team03=Palmas (TO)
| RD4-score03=0 0
| RD4-team04='''15 de Novembro (RS)'''
| RD4-score04=3 1

| RD4-team05=Corinthians (SP)
| RD4-score05=1 0
| RD4-team06='''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD4-score06=0 2

| RD4-team07=Grêmio (RS)
| RD4-score07=0 0
| RD4-team08='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD4-score08=1 0

| RD5-team01='''Santo André (SP)'''
| RD5-score01=3 3
| RD5-team02=15 de Novembro (RS)
| RD5-score02=4 1

| RD5-team03=Vitória (BA)
| RD5-score03=0 0
| RD5-team04='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD5-score04=1 2

| RD6-team01='''Santo André (SP)'''
| RD6-score01=2 2
| RD6-team02=Flamengo (RJ)
| RD6-score02=2 0
}}


{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />2004 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira do Estado de São Paulo.svg|100px|São Paulo]]<br>'''[[Esporte Clube Santo André|Santo André]]'''<br/>'''First Title'''
|}

===Notes===
{{Reflist}}

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20090201161706/http://rsssfbrasil.com/tables/cbr2004.htm Copa do Brasil 2004 at RSSSF]

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{Use mdy dates|date=February 2011}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 2004}}
[[Category:2004 in domestic association football cups]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2004]]
[[Category:2004 in Brazilian football]]
